metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4642
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2. immunoperoxidase labeling of ICAM-5 in WT P14 and P28 mouse visual cortex shows localization to dendritic spines and putative filopodia, as well as dendrites and (to a lesser extend) glia.

Figure 3. "The immunogold reactivity for ICAM-5 also showed the expected distribution in neuronal cell bodies, dendrites, dendritic protrusions and glial profiles, including Iba-1 labeled microglial elements (Figure 3A-D). As the immunogold labeling affords a precise localization, this analysis also revealed that ICAM-5 predominantly localizes to the plasma membrane of neuronal and glial profiles". Experimental description: "Figure 2. ICAM-5 Labeling in WT P14 and P28 mouse visual cortex"

Table 1, antibody for ICAM-5;

Intercellular adhesion molecule 5; Polyclonal antibody; Antiserum produced in rabbit, corresponding to the peptide sequence: AEGGAETPGT AESPADGEVF AIQLTSS which pertains to the last 17 amino acids in the C-terminus of mouse telencephalon.

Gift from Dr. Yoshihara; Brain Science Institute/Institute of Physical and Chemical Research (Wako City, Japan)

Yoshihara et. al., Neuron, 12(3), 541 (1994).
